sourceMovie.title: Army of Thieves
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Army of Thieves works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Army of Thieves clicked for you, Kingsman: The Golden Circle (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Debt Collectors
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Army of Thieves clicked for you, Debt Collectors (2020) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Italian Job
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Army of Thieves clicked for you, The Italian Job (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The International
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Army of Thieves clicked for you, The International (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Army of Thieves?
faq.answer: Try Kingsman: The Golden Circle, Debt Collectors, The Italian Job—each shares DNA with Army of Thieves while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Army of Thieves?
faq.answer: Army of Thieves (2021) is best described as Action, Crime, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Army of Thieves part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Army of the Dead Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
